Title: ogham-mcp had credentials embedded in published PyPI sdists -- Neon postgres URLs and Voyage API key
Description: Between 2026-02 and 2026-04-24 a total of 22 public PyPI sdists of `ogham-mcp` contained development credentials embedded in source files. All credentials have since been rotated on the respective providers. No known exploitation. Upgrade to **v0.11.1** to get a clean release.
NotImpacted: All versions before 0.6.3, all versions starting from 0.11.1
